title: Maelstrom (disambiguation)
content:
The term '''Maelstrom''' could refer one of the following:

==[[Canon]]==
*'''[[Akkadese Maelstrom]]'''— a large cluster of matter that surrounded [[Kessel]].
*'''[[Maelstrom Nebula]]'''— a [[nebula]] where the [[pirate]] [[Gunda Mabin]] operated in.
*'''[[Maelstrom (Maelstrom-class)|''Maelstrom'']]'''— the lead ship of a class of [[battlecruiser]].
*'''[[Maelstrom-class battle cruiser|''Maelstrom''-class battle cruiser]]'''— a class of battlecruiser that served in the [[Navy|navies]] of the [[Galactic Republic]], [[Galactic Empire]], and the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic]].

==[[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]]==
*'''[[Maelstrom Nebula/Legends|Maelstrom Nebula]]''', on the [[Relgim Run/Legends|Relgim Run]] beyond [[Albarrio sector/Legends|Albarrio sector]]
**The '''[[Maelstrom Prison]]'''
*The '''[[Maelstrom (Maelstrom-class)|''Maelstrom'']]''', a [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] of the [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]], which fought in the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]
*The '''[[Maelstrom (Immobilizer 418 cruiser)|''Maelstrom'']]''', an [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Immobilizer 418 cruiser]] of the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]]
*The '''[[Maelstrom-class battle cruiser/Legends|''Maelstrom''-class battle cruiser]]'''
*'''[[Force Maelstrom]]'''— a Dark Side-aligned Force power.

{{Disambig}}
